message:
feat(http): add Cx parameter to HttpClient for cancel-correctness

Add `cx: &Cx` as the first parameter (after `&self`) to all public
HttpClient methods: get, post, put, delete, request, request_streaming,
request_multipart, request_multipart_streaming, post_streaming,
post_multipart, post_multipart_streaming, and connect_tunnel.

The Cx cancellation flag is checked at each blocking I/O phase boundary:
- Before connection establishment (DNS + TCP connect)
- After TCP connect, before TLS handshake
- After TLS handshake
- Before HTTP request/response exchange
- Between redirect hops

If cancelled, returns the new `ClientError::Cancelled` variant.

This is a breaking API change: all callers must now pass a `&Cx`.
Integration tests updated accordingly.

Closes #26

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
